turns.assistantContent:
Root cause confirmed. The `createTestDir` helper creates skills at `{testDir}/skills/` but after the scan path fix (Remediation B), `createOpencodeSkillRegistry` scans `{testDir}/.opencode/skills/`. The test helper was not updated to match.

Now let me verify the remaining checklist items and compile the full report.
